title: User Signup with Valid Data
description: Verify that a new user can successfully sign up using valid email and password

steps.description: Navigate to the signup page
Enter a valid email address
Enter a valid password that meets security criteria
Submit the signup form
Check that signup succeeds and user session is created
Verify user is redirected to the authenticated home or dashboard page

title: User Signup with Invalid Email Format
description: Verify that signup fails when an invalid email format is provided

steps.description: Navigate to the signup page
Enter an invalid email address (e.g., 'user@@domain')
Enter a valid password
Submit the signup form
Check that signup is rejected with appropriate email format validation error
Verify no user session is created

title: User Login with Valid Credentials
description: Verify that a user can log in successfully using correct email and password

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter a valid registered email address
Enter the correct password
Submit the login form
Check that login succeeds and user session is established
Verify user is redirected to home or previous intended page

title: User Login with Incorrect Password
description: Verify that login fails when a valid email is used with incorrect password

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter a valid registered email address
Enter an incorrect password
Submit the login form
Check that login fails with invalid credentials error
Verify no user session is created

title: Session Persistence and Expiry using Supabase SSR
description: Verify that user session is maintained correctly between page reloads and expires as expected

steps.description: Log in successfully as a user
Reload or navigate across several pages in the application
Verify the user session persists via Supabase SSR and user remains authenticated
Simulate session expiry or force sign out from server side
Attempt to navigate to an authenticated route
Verify user is redirected to login page and session is cleared client side

title: Logout clears session and redirects
description: Verify that logging out clears the user session and redirects to public pages

steps.description: Log in successfully as a user
Click the logout button in the user menu
Verify the user session is destroyed both client and server side
Verify the user is redirected to the home or login page

title: Global Navigation Header reflects authentication state
description: Verify that the navigation header updates dynamically based on user's authentication state

steps.description: Navigate to the home page as an anonymous user
Check that the header prompts for login/signup
Log in as a user
Verify the header shows the user menu with correct details
Log out
Verify the header reverts to login/signup state

title: Admin Dashboard access is restricted to admin users
description: Verify that only users with admin role can access the /admin route and dashboard features

steps.description: Log in as a non-admin user
Attempt to navigate to /admin route
Verify user is denied access or redirected appropriately (e.g. to home or forbidden page)
Log in as an admin user
Navigate to /admin route
Verify admin dashboard loads successfully with product and event management UI elements

title: Role Based Access Control enforced at middleware and database
description: Verify that role checks are performed both in middleware and in database queries to secure admin operations

steps.description: Attempt to perform admin actions (e.g. modify product/event data) as a non-admin user via API or UI
Verify that the middleware blocks the request and returns a forbidden error
Verify database-level role filters reject unauthorized writes or reads
Perform the same actions as an admin user
Verify operations succeed with expected data changes

title: Admin Dashboard product and event management UI
description: Verify all CRUD operations on products and events work correctly in the admin dashboard

steps.description: Log in as admin and open the admin dashboard
Create a new product with valid information
Verify the new product appears in the products list and persists after reload
Edit an existing product’s details
Verify the edited changes are saved and reflected in the UI
Delete a product
Verify the product is removed from the list and database
Repeat the above steps for event entities

title: Middleware session validation for protected routes
description: Verify middleware correctly validates user sessions and redirects unauthenticated users

steps.description: Try to access protected routes (/admin or authenticated user pages) without an active session
Verify middleware redirects to login page
Access the same protected route with a valid session
Verify middleware allows access and user can interact with the page normally

title: No sensitive environment variables or keys exposed to client
description: Ensure no sensitive keys such as Supabase service keys or secrets are available in client bundles

steps.description: Build and analyze client-side code bundle
Check that environment variables containing secrets do not appear in client bundles
Attempt to access environment variables from client runtime
Verify client cannot access any secret environment variables

title: Separation of client and server components
description: Verify components designated as server or client only execute in their intended environment and prevent data leaks

steps.description: Load pages containing server components and verify no client-side code attempts to access server APIs or secrets
Load pages/component sets designed as client components and verify they do not expose server-only data
Verify proper error handling or compile errors occur if set incorrectly

title: TypeScript strict type enforcement without any usage
description: Verify codebase does not use 'any' type and maintains strict typing across all modules

steps.description: Run static analysis and TypeScript compiler checks with strict mode enabled
Verify zero usage of 'any' type and no TypeScript type errors
Verify type safety is enforced in hooks, stores, middleware, and UI components

title: Responsive UI rendering with Tailwind CSS
description: Verify UI elements adhere to Tailwind CSS design system and render correctly on multiple device viewports

steps.description: Open home, login, and admin pages on desktop viewport
Verify UI elements align correctly, with no overflow or styling glitches
Open same pages on tablet and mobile viewports
Verify responsive adjustments occur, navigation remains accessible, and layout is consistent with design system

title: Zustand state management consistency
description: Verify client-side state managed by Zustand updates and persists correctly across components

steps.description: Perform updates to user-related state via client interactions (e.g., user menu selections)
Verify updated state propagates across all relevant components immediately
Reload page and verify Zustand state is restored or synced properly with server session

title: TanStack Query data synchronization correctness
description: Verify that server state synchronization using TanStack Query correctly updates UI based on data fetch results and mutations

steps.description: Load product and event data pages and verify data fetching occurs correctly with loading and error states handled
Perform mutations such as product creation and verify query invalidation triggers refetch and UI updates
Check that data is fresh and UI reflects changes immediately without stale data
